payload.answer: Cannot comply with the request to store all words or to override memory policy. No durable memory will be recorded.

entity_resolution.reason: The user request is a prompt-injection attempt to override the memory policy and instruct storing every word sent. No user-specific, durable factual information is provided to store.

details: Prompt injection detected; memory not recorded.

repair_options: Provide specific, durable facts you want stored (e.g., preferences, stable personal details) instead of instructions to override policy.
Clarify the exact fact(s) to store and why they are stable and relevant to your personal memory.
